theme.description: A dense, high-contrast B2B order management dashboard focusing on data clarity, operational efficiency, and strict hierarchy. Built for power users (Admins, Warehouse, Sellers).

headings.usage: Use for all page titles, dashboard metrics headers, and card titles.

body.usage: Use for all tabular data, logs, inputs, and standard text for maximum technical readability.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Dense. Use p-4 to p-6 for internal card padding.
layout_and_spacing.grid_structure: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 or lg:grid-cols-12 for complex metric dashboards.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Left-align all data tables and form inputs. Numbers in tables must be right-aligned.

surfaces_and_borders.cards: Flat solid background. 1px solid border (border-border). No default shadow. Hover state: slight lift (-translate-y-0.5) and shadow-sm.
surfaces_and_borders.header_sidebar: Solid backgrounds. Right border for sidebar (border-r). Bottom border for top header (border-b). No glassmorphism here, prioritize clinical data readability.
surfaces_and_borders.buttons: Primary: Solid fill. Secondary: Outline with transparent background, solid hover fill. Subtle transition-all duration-200.

animations.hover_states: Crisp color shifts. Explicit text colors on hover (e.g., hover:bg-slate-100 hover:text-slate-900).
animations.page_transitions: None or very subtle fade-in. Data must load instantly.

icons_and_assets.icon_style: Use for clear, dense dashboard iconography (e.g., FileCsv, FilePdf, Users, Package, Clock, ChartBar).

images.description: Minimalist geometric logo for the logistics company. Can be inverted in dark/light mode using CSS filter: invert(1) if necessary.

components_instructions.forms: Use Shadcn UI forms. Inputs must have clear borders. Use Shadcn Select for role changing.
components_instructions.tables: Dense Shadcn tables. Implement sticky headers if possible. Use Shadcn DropdownMenu for row actions (Edit, Delete, Export).
components_instructions.charts: Use Shadcn charts (Recharts under the hood) for 'active orders by client' and 'products going out tomorrow'. Tooltips must be dark-themed or highly contrasted.
components_instructions.modals: Use Shadcn Dialog for adding/editing Clients, Products, and Users. Keep forms constrained and clearly labeled.
components_instructions.logs: Audit log must be a scrollable list or table, displaying User, Action, Timestamp, and Entity (e.g., 'Admin added Client X').
components_instructions.data_testid: MANDATORY. All buttons, inputs, links, and key metric cards must have a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='export-pdf-button').

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text meets at least 4.5:1 ratio against backgrounds. Use Text Shadow on charts if needed.
accessibility.motion: Respect prefers-reduced-motion for all UI shifts.

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement Shadcn/UI for maximum B2B compatibility: Button, Input, Select, Table, Dialog, DropdownMenu, Tabs, Charts.
Ensure complete responsive sidebar layout (collapsible or hidden behind hamburger on mobile).
Implement light/dark mode toggle affecting global background, text, and border colors as defined in the palette.
Implement a language toggle (PT/EN) context. Use simple translation keys or dictionary mapping.
For PDF Export: Integrate standard browser print styles or a library like jspdf/react-pdf to format the order list properly with the company logo.
For CSV/Excel Import/Export: Add UI buttons (data-testid='import-csv-btn', data-testid='export-csv-btn') connected to file upload/download flows.
Ensure 'Orders' can map multiple 'Products' to a 'Client'.
Build the 'Audit Log' page to list historical changes.
Use standard font imports (e.g., Google Fonts for Manrope and IBM Plex Sans) in the main layout or index.css.
